name: Polaxory
mission: Make Polaxory the proof that a small Roblox studio with an AI operating layer can out-ship larger teams.
thesis: Roblox is the inference engine. Polaxory is the studio loop. Hypurrclaw is the operating layer that turns signal into shipped updates.

audiences.name: Players
audiences.value: Better Roblox experiences that improve faster because the studio notices what players actually do.

audiences.name: Creators
audiences.value: A command room that turns messy game, repo, and market signal into the next shippable update.

audiences.name: Infrastructure users
audiences.value: Proof that agentic workflows can create durable production loops, not just chatbot answers.

audiences.name: Investors
audiences.value: A wedge into Roblox studios: one successful game loop demonstrates a repeatable AI operating layer for creative production.

nextProfitableShip.title: Round completion reward loop
nextProfitableShip.why: Players need a clearer reason to replay after a completed round.

signals.label: Adjacent Roblox games and update cadence

operators.name: Commit Watcher
operators.purpose: Watch repo changes and summarize build movement.

operators.name: Safe Auto Commit
operators.purpose: Turn approved product intent into repo artifacts.

operators.name: Signal Reader
operators.purpose: Convert Roblox/project signals into prioritized ship suggestions.

operators.name: Patch Generator
operators.purpose: Turn the chosen next ship into implementation tasks and patches.

task.title: Spec and implement round completion reward loop
task.description: Create the first retention-focused Polaxory game improvement: a short reward loop after round completion that gives players a reason to replay.
acceptanceCriteria: Reward appears immediately after round completion.
Reward communicates progress or unlock intent.
Loop does not require paid mechanics in v0.
Implementation can be measured through replay/session signals later.
